relatives & travels; or else due to conflicts there will be all types of troubles.
12th bhava : 9th lord if weak & afflicted with bad aspects in 12th , then conflicts in service,
allegations & changes are put, promotions are stopped, not a good period for trade and business.
If natal Saturn, which is weak and afflicted, comes into this place then there will be conflicts
with authorities leading to charge-sheets & loss of service.
Notes on Paraibhraman Padathi prepared by Prof. Anthony writer for the students of Jyotisha Bharati, Mumbai, India
46
